# ContextDroid documentation contract

Repository Markdown is the maintained documentation source. No downstream website publishing
pipeline is currently configured.

Documentation must distinguish safe-profile automatic rewriting, explicit inherited command
support, and opt-in `rtk-compatible` behavior. Do not copy RTK savings claims, claim transparent
Codex interception, or describe removed remote telemetry. The root README and required documents
listed in `AGENTS.md` are release-gated together.
